keys.meta_description: 隐私政策与 PDPA 合规。
keys.page_subtitle: 符合 PDPA 的隐私政策
keys.p01_p0: 本隐私政策说明 iPrego Pte. Ltd. 如何依据新加坡《个人数据保护法》（PDPA）收集、使用、披露和保护个人数据。
keys.p01_p1: 使用 {brand} 平台即表示您同意本政策所述做法。
keys.p02_p0: 我们可能收集账户信息（姓名、电子邮件、公司、联系方式）、使用信息（登录记录、设备数据、活动日志）以及上传至平台的客户业务数据（员工记录、财务与运营数据）等个人数据。
keys.p02_p1: 这些数据作为提供平台服务的一部分进行处理。
keys.p03_p0: 个人数据可能用于以下目的：
keys.p04_p0: By providing personal data, users consent to its collection and use for the purposes described in this policy.
keys.p04_p1: Users may withdraw consent where permitted under PDPA by contacting us.
keys.p04_p2: Withdrawal of consent may affect the ability to use certain services.
keys.p05_p0: We may disclose personal data to:
keys.p05_ul1_li0: service providers assisting with platform operations
keys.p05_ul1_li3: regulatory authorities where required by law
keys.p05_p2: Such parties are required to maintain confidentiality and data protection standards.
keys.p06_p0: We implement reasonable security arrangements including:
keys.p06_p2: These measures help protect personal data against unauthorized access or disclosure.
keys.p07_p0: Personal data is retained only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected or as required by law.
keys.p07_p1: Customers may request deletion of personal data where applicable.
keys.p08_p0: Under the PDPA, individuals may request:
keys.p08_p2: Requests may be submitted to our Data Protection Officer.
keys.p09_p0: As a cloud-based service, personal data may be processed outside Singapore.
keys.p09_p1: Where this occurs, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to maintain PDPA standards.
keys.p10_p0: In accordance with PDPA requirements, iPrego Pte. Ltd. has appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO).
keys.p10_p1: For privacy inquiries or requests, email {privacy_email_dpo}. Company: {legal_company}. Location: {legal_location}.
keys.p11_p0: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically.
keys.p11_p1: The latest version will always be published on our website.
